title: Expanded Nature
description: The core extension mod for plants, bushes and more!
body:
# Expanded Nature (Core version)
## Summary
This modification adds new plants to the game which all exist in real life. All blocks are available in the creative inventory or via cheats:
```
(/give [player name] expanded_nature:[plant name] [count])
```
Without the expanded nature extension mods _(coming soon!)_, **the plants will not be generated naturally or can be obtained in adventure/survival mode.**
In the non-extended core mod, the plants will not have any special features besides some **vanilla functions** _(bees, walkthrough, etc.)_.

Currently, this mod is in an early state of development. There is no related GitHub page. Bugs and fatal errors can happen at any time. Please report any bugs in the comments section.

![The official "Expanded Nature" logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3d1e86d832db88446480335955a62d9dd9fb4e6_0.webp)
## Have fun!
